physical_build: Flat, oblong, and card-like with human-scale proportions.
stable_visual_summary: The soldier_club is a humanoid, non-human entity characterized by an oblong, flat, card-shaped body. Their anatomy is highly unconventional, featuring hands and feet positioned specifically at the corners of their flat frame. They are human-scale bipedal entities.
distinguishing_features: Hands located at the corners of the body
Feet located at the corners of the body
continuity_constraints: Maintain the specific placement of limbs at the corners of the flat, oblong body.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific facial features or sensory organs are not defined.
Movement style and thickness/depth of the "card" shape are unknown.
